channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: US-Iran War Live Updates: US Launches New Strikes Against Iran

media:content.media:description: The US also revoked a sanctions waiver for Iranian oil.

item.description: Iran War: The United States launched "power strikes" against Iran following a series of attacks by Tehran on commercial ships near the Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded: Iran War: The United States launched "power strikes" against Iran following a series of attacks by Tehran on commercial ships near the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Keir Starmer Claims Turkey's Erdogan Gifted Pistols To Fellow NATO Leaders

media:content.media:description: NATO leaders gathered in Turkey for a two-day summit amid Iran and Ukraine war.

item.description: Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan offered a pistol as a gift to each of his fellow leaders who attended this week's NATO summit in Ankara, British Prime Minister Keir Starmer said Wednesday.
item.content:encoded: Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan offered a pistol as a gift to each of his fellow leaders who attended this week's NATO summit in Ankara, British Prime Minister Keir Starmer said Wednesday.

item.title: US Conducts Fresh Strikes Against Iran, Cites Attacks On Ships
item.description: The United States launched new strikes against Iran on Wednesday in a bid to curb Tehran's ability to target shipping in the Strait of Hormuz, the US military said.
item.content:encoded: The United States launched new strikes against Iran on Wednesday in a bid to curb Tehran's ability to target shipping in the Strait of Hormuz, the US military said.

item.title: US Court Approves Elon Musk's Settlement With Regulators In Twitter Probe

media:content.media:description: Elon Musk paid $44 billion for Twitter in October 2022 and renamed it X.

item.description: A federal judge on Wednesday approved the US Securities and Exchange Commission's settlement with Elon Musk over his purchase of Twitter shares.
item.content:encoded: A federal judge on Wednesday approved the US Securities and Exchange Commission's settlement with Elon Musk over his purchase of Twitter shares.

item.title: US To Remove Syria From Terror Blacklist In Move To Boost Ties With Al-Sharaa

media:content.media:description: Donald Trump meets Syrian President Ahmed al-Sharaa on the sidelines of the NATO Summit in Ankara.

item.description: The United States said Wednesday it will delist Syria as a state sponsor of terrorism, a decades-old designation that severely impeded investment, in a new vote of confidence in leader Ahmed al-Sharaa.
item.content:encoded: The United States said Wednesday it will delist Syria as a state sponsor of terrorism, a decades-old designation that severely impeded investment, in a new vote of confidence in leader Ahmed al-Sharaa.

item.title: US Court Rejects Trump Request To Restore His Name To Kennedy Center
item.description: The Trump administration and Kennedy Center board filed an appeal with the US Court of Appeals for the District of Colombia seeking a stay of Cooper's ruling.
item.content:encoded: The Trump administration and Kennedy Center board filed an appeal with the US Court of Appeals for the District of Colombia seeking a stay of Cooper's ruling.

item.title: Iran Flare-Up Will Over "Very Quickly", Trump Assures After US Strikes

media:content.media:description: The US and Iran exchanged fires after Tehran struck ships in Hormuz.

item.description: Trump said the US is not looking for a long-term war.
item.content:encoded: Trump said the US is not looking for a long-term war.

item.title: 'Ready To Defend Every Inch Of NATO': Denmark After Trump's Greenland Remark

media:content.media:description: Both US and Denmark are founding NATO members.

item.description: Trump's assertions that the US must acquire or control Greenland, a semi-autonomous Danish territory, have long strained relations between Washington and Copenhagen.
item.content:encoded: Trump's assertions that the US must acquire or control Greenland, a semi-autonomous Danish territory, have long strained relations between Washington and Copenhagen.

item.title: UN Experts Condemn Life Sentence For Baloch Political Activist In Pakistan

media:content.media:description: Dr Mahrang Baloch heads the Baloch Yakjehti Committee or BYC.

item.description: UN experts expressed deep concern over what they described as an unfair trial and the misuse of terrorism-related charges against Dr Mahrang Baloch, a leading advocate for the rights of Pakistan's minority Baloch community
item.content:encoded: UN experts expressed deep concern over what they described as an unfair trial and the misuse of terrorism-related charges against Dr Mahrang Baloch, a leading advocate for the rights of Pakistan's minority Baloch community

item.title: In US' Major H-1B Fraud Probe, Trump Official's Cognizant Mention

media:content.media:description: H-1B visa refers to a non-immigrant work permit that US employers use to hire professionals.

item.description: Labour Department Inspector General Anthony D'Esposito said officials have already issued multiple subpoenas as part of the large-scale probe into suspected labour trafficking and abuse of foreign worker programmes.
item.content:encoded: Labour Department Inspector General Anthony D'Esposito said officials have already issued multiple subpoenas as part of the large-scale probe into suspected labour trafficking and abuse of foreign worker programmes.

item.title: Signing In Versailles To "It's Over": Timeline Of Fragile Iran-US Deal

media:content.media:description: The latest escalation came even as Iran was holding a multi-day state funeral for Ali Khamenei

item.description: By Wednesday, US President Donald Trump signalled there was little hope of reviving the agreement, saying the ceasefire was effectively "over".
item.content:encoded: By Wednesday, US President Donald Trump signalled there was little hope of reviving the agreement, saying the ceasefire was effectively "over".

item.title: In Talks, Myanmar Assures Its Land Will Not Be Used For Action Against India

media:content.media:description: This decision has come after the 23rd National Level Meeting between the two countries held in New Delhi.

item.description: An important assurance given by the country to India is that no action will be undertaken against the interests of India from Myanmar territory.
item.content:encoded: An important assurance given by the country to India is that no action will be undertaken against the interests of India from Myanmar territory.

item.title: Brent Price Briefly Touches $80 A Barrel After Fresh Iran-US Tensions

media:content.media:description: The United States launched extensive strikes on Iran this week.

item.description: This comes after US President Donald Trump said the ceasefire with Iran was over.
item.content:encoded: This comes after US President Donald Trump said the ceasefire with Iran was over.

item.title: Geneva To Host Global AI Summit In June 2027, Switzerland Unveils Agenda

media:content.media:description: The Geneva AI Summit will build on the momentum created by the AI Impact Summit in New Delhi

item.description: The announcement was made by Swiss Federal Councillor Albert Rosti during his opening address at the AI for Good Global Summit 2026 in Geneva, where he underscored Switzerland's commitment to fostering global cooperation on AI and ensuring the technology delivers broad societal benefits.
item.content:encoded: The announcement was made by Swiss Federal Councillor Albert Rosti during his opening address at the AI for Good Global Summit 2026 in Geneva, where he underscored Switzerland's commitment to fostering global cooperation on AI and ensuring the technology delivers broad societal benefits.

item.title: Fighting War With Iran, Trump's "Islamic Republic Of Japan" Faux Pas

media:content.media:description: The commen quickly spread across social media, where clips of the moment were widely shared

item.description: The comment, which appeared to confuse the Islamic Republic of Iran with Japan, quickly spread across social media, where clips of the moment were widely shared.
item.content:encoded: The comment, which appeared to confuse the Islamic Republic of Iran with Japan, quickly spread across social media, where clips of the moment were widely shared.

item.title: Iran Carries Out Retaliatory Strikes On US Military Bases In Bahrain, Kuwait

media:content.media:description: Both sides reported hitting dozens of targets. (Representational Image)

item.description: The United States launched extensive strikes on Iran over attacks on ships in the vital Strait of Hormuz, triggering a wave of reprisals Wednesday that Iran's Guards said...
item.content:encoded: The United States launched extensive strikes on Iran over attacks on ships in the vital Strait of Hormuz, triggering a wave of reprisals Wednesday that Iran's Guards said...

item.title: 'Been Lucky, Maybe That Won't Last': Trump Claims Iran Plotting To Kill Him

media:content.media:description: Trump's comments come after he declared the Memorandum of Understanding with Iran "over"

item.description: Addressing reporters on the sidelines of the NATO Summit in Turkey, Trump said that although he has been "lucky" all this while, when it comes to assassinations, it might not continue to be the case.
item.content:encoded: Addressing reporters on the sidelines of the NATO Summit in Turkey, Trump said that although he has been "lucky" all this while, when it comes to assassinations, it might not continue to be the case.

item.title: India, Maldives Begin Talks On Free Trade Agreement To Boost Economic Ties

media:content.media:description: The two ministers reviewed the progress of ongoing economic initiatives between the countries

item.description: The announcement followed bilateral discussions between Maldives Minister of Economic Development, Transport and Trade Mohamed Saeed and India's Minister of Commerce and Industry, Shri Piyush Goyal, during Minister Saeed's official visit to India.
item.content:encoded: The announcement followed bilateral discussions between Maldives Minister of Economic Development, Transport and Trade Mohamed Saeed and India's Minister of Commerce and Industry, Shri Piyush Goyal, during Minister Saeed's official visit to India.

item.title: US To Let Ukraine Make Patriot Missiles To Fight Russia, Says Trump

media:content.media:description: Ukraine has been conducting strikes deep into Russia. (File)

item.description: Ukraine has been struggling to shoot down Russian ballistic missile attacks as supplies of the crucial US-made Patriot interceptors run low.
item.content:encoded: Ukraine has been struggling to shoot down Russian ballistic missile attacks as supplies of the crucial US-made Patriot interceptors run low.

item.title: Trump's Board Of Peace Plans First 'Humanitarian Zone' In South Gaza: Report

media:content.media:description: Rafah was effectively razed by fighting and Israeli bombing during the war.

item.description: The zone could act as a "starting point" for the Palestinian technocratic committee meant to assume day-to-day governance during Gaza's transitional phase out of war under Trump's 20-point plan.
item.content:encoded: The zone could act as a "starting point" for the Palestinian technocratic committee meant to assume day-to-day governance during Gaza's transitional phase out of war under Trump's 20-point plan.
